[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0000001000 1
1 0011010101 5
2 1000000010 2
3 0000001000 1
4 0010001101 4
5 1100101011 6
6 0001101110 5
7 1100110110 6

12 21 0000001001 2
23 32 0000101010 3

45 54 0100000000 1
56 65 0100001000 2
67 76 0101010101 5
70 07 0001000010 2

47 74 1100010110 5

61 16 0010001101 4 match 4
72 27 1100000011 4

37 73 0001000110 3
